scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=shared && concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev --workspace=server"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run dev --workspace=server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.build:railway: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --project client/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project shared/tsconfig.json
